records.ety: [Cf. F. pensionnaire one who pays for his board. Cf. Pensionary, n.]

defs: One in receipt of a pension; hence, figuratively, a dependent.
quotes: The fickle pensioners of Morpheus' train.

defs: One of an honorable band of gentlemen who attend the sovereign of England on state occasions, and receive an annual pension, or allowance, of 150 and two horses.
In the university of Cambridge, England, one who pays for his living in commons; -- corresponding to commoner at Oxford.
